'''Vor'en Kurn''' was a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned<ref name="GOI" /> [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who wore a modified [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] face mask to protect his identity.

==History==
[[File:VorenKurn-TCWCampaignGuide.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Kurn during the Clone Wars]]
Following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Vor'en Kurn joined a group of freedom fighters who helped clean up after the broken [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] blockade of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. While working, Kurn was hit by a blast from a [[Droideka/Legends|Destroyer droid]] that was scheduled for decommission. He was rescued by a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] named [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]], who resided on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

At some point after [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the galactic conflict known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Kurn joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and worked alongside [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]].<ref name="TCWCG">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
While Vor'en Kurn was originally drawn with light skin, his image was reprinted in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'' with a blue tint, though he was still labeled as Human. The change was confirmed in ''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'', which describes him as being a "blue-skinned elite trooper" in an Example of Play.
